## What the user wants
Open pull request #1342 ('Add streaming TTS') in the current browser.

## You are here
- App: Arc — GitHub homepage tab
- Other tab open: 'PR #1342 · Add streaming TTS' at https://github.com/co/repo/pull/1342

## How to do it on Arc
The PR URL is known — use the fastest tool:

1. **open_url** `https://github.com/co/repo/pull/1342`. This will navigate the current tab.
2. (Alternative) Switch to the existing PR tab via `cmd+T`, type `1342`, `return`. (Recipe 'switch to existing tab' has seen_count 5.)

## What "the PR" means
Pull request #1342 on github.com/co/repo — currently in active_task.resources and was last seen 30 min ago when the user merged it.
